item.title: As China Encroaches, Even New Zealand Is Getting Serious About Its Military
item.description: Billions will be spent in the coming years—including on missiles, drones and base upgrades—as the remote country squares up to a widening threat.

item.title: Xi Jinping’s Morality Crackdown Has a New Victim: The Global Wine Trade
item.description: Reduced demand from China is forcing vineyard owners from Bordeaux to Australia to rip up vines and leave grapes to rot in the fields.

item.title: Tech Exec Accused of Smuggling Nvidia Chips to China Resigns From Board
item.description: Super Micro co-founder exits after he and two others are accused of diverting U.S.-assembled servers to China, violating export control laws.

item.title: Leaders of AI Firm Bought by Meta Are Restricted From Leaving China
item.description: Beijing is weighing penalties for key figures at Manus, a Singapore startup with Chinese origins.

item.title: China Isn’t Rushing Taiwan—It’s Squeezing It Slowly
item.description: Plus, without mechanisms to make any war catastrophic for Beijing, one expert warns, failure to deter it in the Taiwan Strait could plunge the world into chaos.

item.title: The Silicon Valley Salesman Accused of Helping China Get Nvidia’s Top Chips
item.description: A recently unsealed indictment naming Wally Liaw, co-founder of Super Micro Computer, puts the company at the center of the U.S.-China tech war.

item.title: China Targets Lawyers Defending Jailed Christian Leaders
item.description: The arrest of pastor Ezra Jin has drawn criticism from Secretary of State Marco Rubio and members of Congress.

item.title: Beijing’s Big Problem: An Incredible Shrinking Economy
item.description: China has taken pride in its explosive growth over the decades. But now, its economy is falling behind because of deflation and a weak currency.

item.title: The U.S. Navy’s New Insurance Policy for War With China Is an Australian Base
item.description: The Pentagon plans to deploy submarines to an expanding facility in allies’ strategy to deter Beijing.

item.title: U.S. Builds Tech Bloc to Counter China, Adds India as Newest Member
item.description: With Pax Silica, the Trump administration is retreating from an adversarial stance it took toward allies and friends last year.
